assertions.title: Each qualifying child with valid SSN contributes exactly $2,200 to pre-phaseout credit
assertions.description: Per-Dependent contribution check. Validates R001 + R004 + R008 collectively. Bug it catches: SSN check accidentally relaxed (e.g., accepts ITIN) or stale TCJA $2,000 amount.

assertions.title: Each qualifying other dependent contributes exactly $500 to pre-phaseout credit
assertions.description: Per-Dependent contribution check. Validates R002 + R005 + R009. Bug it catches: ODC mis-amount; double-counting a child as both CTC and ODC.

assertions.title: Phaseout reduction = 5% × ceil((MAGI − threshold)/1000)×1000; threshold $400K MFJ else $200K
assertions.description: Validates R011-R013 (threshold selection + ceil rounding + 5% multiplier). Bug it catches: wrong threshold per filing status; floor vs ceil; using base §24(b)(2) thresholds instead of §24(h)(3) override.

definition.formula: max(0, ceil(max(0, magi - (400000 if filing_status=='MFJ' else 200000)) / 1000) * 1000 * 0.05)

assertions.title: ACTC spillover behavior (combined: overflow exists + per-child cap + earned-income cap)
assertions.description: Validates R017-R022, R029. Combined assertion per Q7.4 with sub-condition labels for debugging. Bug it catches: ACTC computed when ineligible; overflow miscalculated; wrong cap selected.

assertions.title: Refundable + nonrefundable ≤ post-phaseout AND ≤ pre-phaseout (universal invariant)
assertions.description: Two checks: tight (L_14 + L_27 ≤ L_12) and loose (L_14 + L_27 ≤ L_8). Both per Q7.2. Bug it catches: double-counting; refund exceeding credited amount; pre-phaseout overflow if L_12 itself is buggy.

assertions.title: Dependent without valid SSN contributes $0 to CTC (gates R001 SSN test)
assertions.description: Validates the SSN test inside R001. Per-Dependent gating. Bug it catches: SSN check accidentally accepts ITIN/ATIN for CTC purposes.

definition.implication: dep_qualifies_ctc == False AND contributes 0 to SCH_8812.L_5

assertions.title: Taxpayer SSN missing → both Form 1040 Lines 19 and 28 forced to $0 (return-level)
assertions.description: Validates R003 + R030. THE highest-value assertion for catching the OBBBA §70104(b) change. Bug it catches: pre-OBBBA implementations that skip the taxpayer-SSN check.

assertions.title: MAGI reconciliation: Line 3 = Line 1 + Line 2d (= 2a + 2b + 2c)
assertions.description: Validates R006 + R007. Bug it catches: using AGI directly as MAGI (missing addbacks); Form 2555 line 45 included but not line 50.

assertions.title: Form 2555 filer: ACTC = $0, but CTC and ODC remain available
assertions.description: Validates R017 (Form 2555 check). Bug it catches: implementations that either (a) block CTC entirely for 2555 filers OR (b) allow ACTC for 2555 filers.

definition.non_implication: L_14 computed per normal CTC rules (unchanged)

assertions.title: Part II-B path selection: triggers iff 3+ QC AND 15% < per-child cap; selects max
assertions.description: Validates R023, R028, R029. Bug it catches: Part II-B applied to <3 QC; not applied when warranted; using L_25 alone instead of max(L_20, L_25).

assertions.title: Schedule 8812 Lines 14 and 27 flow to Form 1040 Lines 19 and 28
assertions.description: Validates 1040.R001 + 1040.R002 (cross-form flow). Bug it catches: lines swapped, or flow not implemented at all.

assertions.title: Phaseout rounding: any non-zero excess rounds UP to next multiple of $1,000
assertions.description: Validates R012 rounding behavior with explicit test cases per Q7.3. THE single most common phaseout implementation bug. Maps directly to TS05 ($410,500) and TS05b ($400,001).

assertions.title: Dependent classification mutually exclusive: NOT (dep_qualifies_ctc AND dep_qualifies_odc)
assertions.description: Table invariant on Dependent records. A single dependent cannot be both CTC-qualifying and ODC-qualifying simultaneously (Sch 8812 Form Line 6 caution: 'do not include anyone you included on line 4'). Bug it catches: UI/data-entry bug that sets both flags.
